title: Shadeless Blocks
description: All blocks (included modded) are now shadeless.
body:
Minecraft's default shading is now disabled for all blocks. This mod intercepts block models during startup and recreates them with shading turned off. It works automatically on all vanilla and modded blocks.

![village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/793ac9846b9c025444ac48d85160d7557eb5a6b5.png)

**If you have [VintageFix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vintagefix) disable this line:**
> mixin.dynamic_resources=false

**Pairs well with [Shadeless Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/shadeless-mobs)**
